## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible impact.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests before or after the change.
- [ ] I updated or added deterministic tests where practical.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples if behavior changed.
- [ ] I checked install/startup paths if this touches packaging, CLI, GUI, or release docs.
- [ ] I stated clearly whether any hardware-backed path is verified now, only prepared, or still pending lab validation.
- [ ] I included the exact verification commands below.
